name: kontekstkl
description: Portfolio management API for Farah Ismail — architect, interior designer, art director, and model based in Kuala Lumpur. Use these tools to read, create, update, and manage her portfolio entries, timeline updates, media, and profile.

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Call this FIRST in every session. Returns a full snapshot: all portfolio entries (summary), profile info, 10 most recent timeline updates, and aggregate stats. Use this to orient yourself before taking any action.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Fuzzy search across all entries, tags, locations, clients, and timeline updates. Use this when Farah mentions a project by partial name, location, or keyword — e.g. 'the Langkawi project', 'that hotel thing', 'Penang work'. Returns matching entries and updates ranked by relevance.

q.description: Search query — can be a project name, location, tag, client, or keyword

tools.name: list_entries
tools.description: List all portfolio entries with full details including timeline updates and media. Use get_context for a lighter summary, or this when you need complete entry data.

tools.name: get_entry
tools.description: Get a single portfolio entry by its slug, including all timeline updates and media. Use search first if you don't know the exact slug.

tools.name: create_entry
tools.description: Create a new portfolio entry. Generate a URL-safe slug from the title. Ask Farah to confirm category and entry type if unclear.

tools.name: update_entry
tools.description: Update fields on an existing portfolio entry. Only include fields that are changing. Use search to find the slug if needed.

slug.description: URL slug of the entry to update

tools.name: delete_entry
tools.description: Permanently delete a portfolio entry and all its timeline updates and media. Always confirm with Farah before deleting.

tools.name: add_update
tools.description: Add a timeline update to a portfolio entry. This is the primary way Farah logs progress — site visit notes, milestones reached, thoughts, photo descriptions. Use today's date unless Farah specifies otherwise. Infer the type from context: 'milestone' for completions/achievements, 'photo' for image-related, 'thought' for reflections/ideas, 'note' for everything else.

text.description: The update text — write in Farah's voice (first person, reflective, specific)

tools.name: get_updates
tools.description: Get all timeline updates for a specific entry, ordered by date (newest first).

tools.name: add_media
tools.description: Attach a media item (photo, sketch, render, document) to a portfolio entry. The URL should point to an already-uploaded file (e.g. Vercel Blob). Infer mediaType from context: 'photo' for photographs, 'sketch' for drawings/hand sketches, 'render' for 3D/CGI, 'document' for PDFs/plans.

tools.name: get_media
tools.description: Get all media items for a specific entry, ordered by sort order.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file (photo, voice note, sketch, document) and get back a permanent URL. Use this before add_media — upload first, then attach to an entry. Supports multipart form data or JSON with base64-encoded data. Suggested folders: 'photos', 'sketches', 'renders', 'documents', 'voice-notes'.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get Farah's profile and online status.

tools.name: update_profile
tools.description: Update Farah's profile info or online status. Use this to set online/offline status, update current activity, or change any profile field.

currentActivity.description: What Farah is currently working on (shown on the site)
